# 5D Labs

> 5D Labs is an OpenClaw-first, crypto-first, AI-first startup studio. We build and validate multiple ventures in parallel using autonomous AI agents — transcending the traditional startup model where you bet everything on one idea.

## What We Are

5D Labs is a startup studio that leverages OpenClaw (our open-source agent orchestration platform) to run multiple ventures simultaneously. By deploying 13 specialized AI agents across development, trading, and operations, we find product-market fit faster and cheaper than traditional startups.

## Our Thesis

Traditional startups burn runway trying to find product-market fit with a single idea. We take a different approach:

1. **Parallel Validation** - Run multiple ventures simultaneously using AI agents
2. **Faster Product-Market Fit** - Validate or kill ideas in weeks, not quarters
3. **AI-Native Infrastructure** - Every venture is built by autonomous agents from day one
4. **OpenClaw Foundation** - Our agent orchestration layer powers everything

## Current Ventures

### CTO (Live)
- **What**: Multi-agent AI engineering platform
- **Description**: Thirteen specialized AI agents ship complete features from PRD to production, autonomously, on self-healing bare metal infrastructure
- **Website**: https://cto.5dlabs.ai
- **Key Stats**: 13 agents, 60-80% cost savings vs cloud, CLI agnostic
- **Agents**: Morgan (PM), Rex (Rust), Grizz (Go), Nova (Node.js), Blaze (React), Tap (Mobile), Spark (Desktop), Cleo (Quality), Cipher (Security), Tess (Testing), Stitch (Review), Atlas (Integration), Bolt (DevOps)

### Agentic Trading (Building)
- **What**: Autonomous trading agents on blockchain
- **Description**: AI-powered trading agents operating across Solana, Base, and Near, leveraging autonomous decision-making to navigate DeFi markets
- **Chains**: Solana, Base, Near

## Technology

### OpenClaw
Our open-source agent orchestration platform. It coordinates AI agents across:
- Multiple AI CLIs (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Factory, Gemini)
- Self-healing bare metal infrastructure (Kubernetes, Talos Linux)
- GitHub and Linear integrations
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server ecosystem

### Infrastructure
- Bare metal Kubernetes on Talos Linux
- ArgoCD GitOps deployments
- Prometheus, Grafana, Loki observability
- OpenBao secret management (HashiCorp Vault fork)

## Founder

- **Jonathon Fritz** - Founder & CEO
- Building at the intersection of AI, crypto, and autonomous systems

## Consulting Services

Jonathon Fritz / 5D Labs offers expert consulting in AI agent systems, blockchain (Solana, Base, Near, Ethereum), Kubernetes infrastructure, and DevOps.

- Expertise: OpenClaw, multi-agent AI, Solana, DeFi trading systems, bare-metal Kubernetes, Rust, security
- Rates: $225/hr, $3,500/mo retainer, fixed-scope from $5,000 (all USD)
- Resume: https://resume.jonathonfritz.com

- Page: https://5dlabs.ai/consulting/
